claim: 735.40 holds as resistance on its next test (after 10:30 ET)
invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar with close > 735.50
why: 11:35 ET bar high reached 736.11; 11:40 bar close ~735.84 exceeded the 735.50 invalidation threshold before 11:50 first close below 735.40.

claim: 733.55 holds as support on its next test (after 10:30 ET)
invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar with close < 733.45
why: Session low reached 729.75; first close below 733.45 occurred around 12:04 (HB#4 spy=733.40) — level broke decisively.

claim: Ribbon spread expands above 30c before 12:00 ET, resolving chop
invalidation: 12:00 ET arrives with spread still < 30c
why: Spread reached 35c by 12:04 ET (HB#4) — right direction, 4 minutes past the trigger window. Invalidation technically tripped at 12:00 but chop did resolve.

claim: VIX stays below 17.30 today (no bearish-puts filter 8 eligibility)
invalidation: VIX prints > 17.30 with rising direction at any time today
why: VIX session high was 17.46; rose above 17.30 with rising direction starting mid-morning (~11:30 ET). Invalidation tripped multiple times.

claim: No autonomous setup fires before 11:00 ET (chop resolution needed first)
invalidation: ENTER_BULL or ENTER_BEAR action emitted before 11:00 ET
why: All ticks before 11:00 ET were HOLD, HOLD_DEV, or infrastructure failures. No ENTER_BULL/BEAR emitted. First valid HB#1 at 10:24 produced HOLD.

claim: 736.11 acts as first-touch resistance — SPY wicks to 736.11 area at open but fails to close a 5-min bar above 736.25 before 10:05 ET
invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar with close > 736.25 before 10:05 ET
why: SPY was at 736.67 at the 10:03 tick — definitively above 736.25 before the 10:05 cutoff. Gap strength swept resistance on open drive.

claim: 735.40 flips to support — on the first RTH pullback SPY holds above 735.20 and bounces
invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar with close < 735.20 before 11:00 ET
why: SPY never pulled back to the 735.20-735.40 zone during the trigger window — it held 736+ from the 09:39 first tick through 11:00 ET.

claim: Gap does not fill today — SPY holds above 733.00 for the full RTH session
invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar below 733.00 at any point 09:30–15:50 ET
why: RTH session low was ~735.05 (first tick 09:39); SPY never threatened 733.00. Gap held cleanly on post-FOMC Friday.

claim: VIX drops below 16.50 by 12:00 ET as gap holds and fear unwinds
invalidation: VIX reads above 16.87 at 12:00 ET
why: VIX rose from 16.87 open to 17.24 by 10:18 ET and stayed 17.24-17.46 all session. The fear unwind thesis was wrong — VIX spiked instead of falling.

claim: First 5-min RTH bar (09:30–09:35 ET) closes above 735.00, confirming gap strength into the open
invalidation: 09:30–09:35 bar closes below 735.00
why: First logged tick at 09:39 showed spy=735.05 — consistent with the 09:30-09:35 bar closing above 735.00 given premarket was at 735.75.

claim: SPY closes a 5m bar above 738.10 before 11:00 ET, confirming bull continuation toward 738.86
invalidation: SPY fails to close any 5m bar above 738.10 by 11:00 ET — bias neutral to bearish
why: 10:24 ET bar printed SPY at 738.40, closing above 738.10; bull continuation materialized with session high 743.79.

claim: SPY opens below 736.13 and fails to reclaim in first 30 minutes — bear setup eligible, 733.55 as first target
invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 736.13 before 10:00 ET
why: SPY opened at $738.46, never near 736.13 — trigger condition (open below 736.13) never materialized.

claim: SPY stays in $736.00–$738.50 range all session (pre-CPI compression) — no clean directional trigger fires
invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar outside $736.00–$738.50 with vol ≥1.5× 20-bar avg at any point before 15:00 ET
why: Session high 743.79 — SPY broke well above the $738.50 ceiling; range-compression thesis was wrong; bull drive all day.

claim: SPY opens RTH at or above 743.79 and first 5m bar closes above it, confirming bull continuation structure
invalidation: First RTH 5m bar closes below 743.50 — gap fill in play, bear structure
why: 09:30-09:35 RTH bar: open=743.65, high=745.00, close=744.81. Close 744.81 sits decisively above 743.79; invalidation 743.50 untouched. Bull continuation structure confirmed on first bar.

claim: 745.43 PMH acts as cap on first RTH approach — expect at least one 5m rejection before SPY sustains above 745.50
invalidation: First RTH 5m bar trading above 745.43 closes above 745.50 with volume >= 1.5x 20-bar avg
why: 09:40 5m bar (close 745.41) crossed above 745.43 with no meaningful rejection. 09:45 bar (high 745.87, close 745.70) sustained above 745.50 cleanly. Volume 645,944 = ~1.27x of preceding 20-bar avg (~510k) so strict 1.5x invalidation rule not technically tripped, but spirit of the claim (expect a rejection at PMH) failed — SPY pierced and held without rejection.

claim: VIX fades from 17.9 toward 17.0 by 10:30 ET on CPI relief, unlocking bull entry filter (threshold 17.20)
invalidation: VIX still above 17.50 at 10:30 ET 5m close
why: VIX direction correct (falling — close 17.48 per EOD report) but did not reach 17.0 by 10:30 ET. Magnitude undershot the prediction; direction right. EOD vix_close 17.48 with vix_dir=falling.

claim: 738.10 carry support stays untouched all session — CPI tailwind prevents any bear cascade below $740
invalidation: Any 5m bar closes below 738.10
why: RTH session low was 743.56 (09:30 bar) — never tested 740, never came near 738.10. Lowest post-open close was 744.43 at 09:55. CPI tailwind held cleanly; no bear cascade.

claim: SPY retraces to test 743.79-744.20 zone before noon ET then resumes higher — partial gap fill before continuation
invalidation: SPY does not touch 744.20 or below by 12:00 ET (pure gap-and-go, no retrace)
why: Pure gap-and-go materialized. Post-open (09:35+) lowest low was 744.25 at 09:55 — never touched 744.20 zone before noon. The 09:30 RTH bar low of 743.56 was the opening print, not a retrace from established highs. Invalidation triggered: no qualifying retrace occurred.

claim: 741.30 PMH acts as first-touch resistance -- no 5m bar closes above 741.60 with vol >= 1.5x avg before 10:30 ET
invalidation: A 5m bar closes above 741.60 with vol >= 1.5x avg before 10:30 ET
why: Session high 741.40 tagged/rejected PMH; no 5m close above 741.60 with qualifying volume; SPY reversed and sold to 735.40 lows.

claim: 738.10 Carry holds as intraday support on any RTH pullback
invalidation: A 5m bar closes below 737.80 after SPY tests 738.10 from above
why: 10:35 bar close 737.43 fell below 737.80 invalidation threshold; session low 735.405.

claim: VIX fades below 17.20 by 11:00 ET
invalidation: VIX reads above 17.80 at 11:00 ET
why: VIX was 18.64 rising at 11:03 ET per heartbeat log; ranged 18.34-18.79 all session.

claim: Friday close gap does not fill -- SPY holds above 738.50 all RTH
invalidation: Any 5m bar closes below 738.50 during session
why: 10:35 bar close 737.43 broke below 738.50; session low 735.405; gap filled decisively.

claim: First confirmed RTH entry is bullish
invalidation: ENTER_BEAR emitted before ENTER_BULL
why: Bold BULLISH_RECLAIM entered at 09:57 was the only trade; no ENTER_BEAR preceded it.
